hero.desc: I'm Unai. Full Stack Developer based in Bilbao. This is where I document the projects I build and what I pick up along the way.

about.title: About me
about.note: Bilbao → production, via Spring Boot and React.
about.quote: I build software thinking about the people who'll actually use it: if it doesn't hold up in production, with real data and real load, it doesn't matter how good the demo looked.
about.bio1: Full Stack Developer with 1.5 years of experience, graduated in Computer Engineering from UPV/EHU. I'm passionate about building complete products that actually work, not just pretty demos.
about.bio2: I work across the full product cycle: from the data model and the Spring Boot API to the React interface, plus auth, deployment, and CI/CD. This portfolio collects the projects I build on my own and the things I learn along the way.

projects.placeholderDesc1: The first project on this list is on its way. Check back soon — meanwhile, take a look at this very portfolio's code on GitHub.
projects.placeholderDesc2: Second slot reserved for a real project: name, description, stack, and GitHub/demo links as soon as it's ready to show.
